## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — test additions or fixes
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, CI, dependencies
- [ ] `security` — vulnerability fix
- [ ] `style` — formatting, linting, or non-code changes
- [ ] `ci` — CI configuration and workflows

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run verify` passes (`check` → `build` → `boundaries`)
- [ ] New or modified code has tests at the correct pyramid level
- [ ] No `.skip`, `.only`, or `fdescribe` left in test files
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changed (README, docs/, or inline docstrings)
- [ ] Layer boundaries respected (see [ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md))
